targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG((metadata->>'total_pct_saving')::float)::numeric,1) AS pct_reduction FROM traces WHERE ('${tenant}' = '.*' OR metadata->>'tenant_id' = '${tenant}') AND metadata->>'user_id' = 'pitch-optimized' AND (metadata->>'model_requested' = 'gpt-4o-mini' OR metadata->>'model' = 'gpt-4o-mini')

SELECT ROUND(AVG((metadata->>'total_pct_saving')::float)::numeric,1) AS pct_reduction FROM traces WHERE ('${tenant}' = '.*' OR metadata->>'tenant_id' = '${tenant}') AND metadata->>'user_id' = 'pitch-optimized' AND (metadata->>'x_rag_collection' IS NOT NULL OR metadata->>'rag_collection' IS NOT NULL)

SELECT ROUND(AVG((metadata->>'total_pct_saving')::float)::numeric,1) AS pct_reduction FROM traces WHERE metadata->>'user_id' = 'pitch-optimized' AND (metadata->>'model_requested' = 'gpt-4o' OR metadata->>'model' = 'gpt-4o') AND (metadata->>'x_rag_collection') IS NULL

panels.title: Baseline vs Optimized - Tokens per Run

targets.rawSql: SELECT metadata->>'user_id' AS run_type, ROUND(AVG((metadata->>'baseline_tokens')::float)) AS avg_baseline_tokens, ROUND(AVG((metadata->>'final_tokens_sent')::float)) AS avg_final_tokens FROM traces WHERE metadata->>'user_id' IN ('pitch-baseline','pitch-optimized') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM traces WHERE metadata->>'user_id' = 'pitch-optimized' AND (metadata->>'cache_hit')::boolean = true

SELECT key AS g_group, SUM((value->>'abs_saving')::int) AS tokens_saved FROM traces, jsonb_each(metadata->'step_savings') WHERE metadata->>'user_id' = 'pitch-optimized' AND (value->>'abs_saving')::int > 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY tokens_saved DESC

SELECT id AS request_id, created_at::time(0) AS time, metadata->>'model_requested' AS model, (metadata->>'baseline_tokens')::int AS baseline, (metadata->>'final_tokens_sent')::int AS final, ROUND((metadata->>'total_pct_saving')::numeric,1) AS pct_saving, ROUND((metadata->>'cost_saving_usd')::numeric,6) AS cost_saved FROM traces WHERE metadata->>'user_id' = 'pitch-optimized' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Waterfall - Step Savings per Optimized Call

targets.rawSql: SELECT t.id AS request_id, t.metadata->>'model_requested' AS model, s.key AS g_group, (s.value->>'abs_saving')::int AS tokens_saved, ROUND((s.value->>'pct_saving_vs_baseline')::numeric,1) AS pct_of_baseline, s.value->>'description' AS description FROM traces t, jsonb_each(t.metadata->'step_savings') s WHERE t.metadata->>'user_id' = 'pitch-optimized' AND (s.value->>'abs_saving')::int > 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, s.key

SELECT metadata->>'user_id' AS run_type, created_at, metadata->>'model_requested' AS model, (metadata->>'baseline_tokens')::int AS baseline_tokens, (metadata->>'final_tokens_sent')::int AS final_tokens, ROUND((metadata->>'total_pct_saving')::numeric,1) AS pct_saving, ROUND((metadata->>'cost_saving_usd')::numeric,6) AS cost_saved_usd, (metadata->>'cache_hit')::boolean AS cache_hit, metadata->>'routed_model' AS routed_model FROM traces WHERE metadata->>'user_id' IN ('pitch-baseline','pitch-optimized') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 6

list.name: Pitch Test Runs
list.rawQuery: SELECT created_at AS time, (metadata->>'user_id') || ' - ' || metadata->>'model_requested' AS text FROM traces WHERE metadata->>'user_id' IN ('pitch-baseline','pitch-optimized') ORDER BY created_at
